summary: Prashnakosh V1 Blueprint Marks Decoupling - All features verified. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Login works for all 4 roles (Super Admin, HOD, Teacher, Student) with correct session TTL (Student=3h, others=24h). Session expiry returns 401 with SESSION_EXPIRED code. Blueprint validation endpoint (validate-multiset) returns capacity analysis. Multi-set generation (generate-multiset) stores questionMarksMap in questionSets. Select-by-blueprint returns questions with blueprint-assigned marks. Academic coverage dashboard loads correctly with section/lesson/topic breakdown. Frontend: Dark cosmic UI with glassmorphism applied. HOD dashboard has 4 tabs (Review Questions, Blueprint Manager, Generate Paper, Send for Approval). Sidebar navigation works across all pages. Question list shows original teacher marks as metadata.
critical_code_review_comments: question-selection-engine.ts: Lines 285, 555 correctly REMOVED marks filter from selection criteria
question-selection-engine.ts: Lines 370, 501 correctly override marks with section.marks (blueprint assigns marks)
routes.ts Line 3767: questionMarksMap correctly stored in questionSets JSONB
routes.ts Lines 3920,4071,4164,4362: applyBlueprintMarks helper correctly reads from questionMarksMap
pg-storage.ts: submitExam uses questionMarksMap for grading (line 821)
pg-storage.ts: startMockExam overrides marks from questionMarksMap (lines 764-765)
session-config.ts: Role-based TTL correctly defined (student=3h, others=24h)
auth.ts: Token expiry enforcement correctly returns SESSION_EXPIRED code
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data. Department 3bedf6c1-d838-4851-a27d-9774fa2b027a has 15 approved questions (12 mcq + 3 short_answer) out of 41 required by blueprint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blueprint marks decoupling fully implemented and tested. Key architectural change: selection engine no longer filters by marks - blueprint assigns marks at paper generation time. questionMarksMap stored in test.questionSets JSONB. Mock test grading + PDF/Word export all read from questionMarksMap. Multi-set generation correctly returns partial results with warnings when pool is insufficient. All login flows working with correct expiresAt field and role-based TTL.

validate_multiset.returns: Capacity analysis with sectionAnalysis, remediation, maxSetsNoOverlap

academic_coverage.returns: Department overview with sections, lessons, topics, coverage percentages

question_list_metadata.marks_field: Present in all questions (original teacher marks)

known_limitations.question_pool: Department has only 15 approved questions out of 41 required by blueprint
known_limitations.s3_upload: S3/image upload not tested (missing AWS keys per instructions)
